main_ingredients.name: Chicken
main_ingredients.info: Kaul chicken is a hardy indigenous poultry breed from cdccsc Maharashtra, mainly the Konkan region. It is known for strong immunity, adaptability to free range farming, and tasty meat. Kaul chickens grow slowly but need minimal care. Farmers prefer them for low maintenance, disease resistance, and steady demand in rural and local village  markets markets markets markets markets markets.

main_ingredients.name: Kokum
main_ingredients.info: Kokam is a tropical fruit native  Kokum Kokum to the Western Ghats of India, widely used in Konkani and Maharashtrian cuisine. It has a sour taste and is known for cooling and digestive properties. Kokam is commonly used in curries, sol kadhi, and drinks. It is also valued in traditional medicine for reducing heat, acidity, and improving digestion.
